name: pade-compress
description: Math-based compression via Berlekamp-Massey / Padé approximants over GF(2⁸)

scripts.test:file: npm run compress ./test/gf-structured.bin ./test/gf-structured-compressed.bin && npm run decompress ./test/gf-structured-compressed.bin ./test/gf-structured-result.bin && c/gf-analyze ./test/gf-structured.bin
